title: Webex Calling Migration Overview
transcript: Welcome everyone. Today we'll walk through the CUCM to Webex Calling migration process. First, let's review the assessment phase...

title: CDR Analytics Deep Dive
transcript: In this session we cover CDR feed endpoints, the 12-hour window constraint, and how to pull usage reports programmatically...

title: RoomOS Device Management
transcript: RoomOS devices connect via Cloud API. We'll demonstrate xAPI commands for dial, camera presets, and standby control...

title: Contact Center Best Practices
transcript: Setting up call queues, auto attendants, and hunt groups in Webex Calling. Let's start with queue overflow routing...
